name: Greg Lake
description: English bassist, guitarist, vocalist, songwriter and producer (1947–2016)
abstract: Gregory Stuart Lake (10 November 1947 – 7 December 2016) was an English musician, singer, and songwriter. He gained prominence as a founding member of the progressive rock bands King Crimson and Emerson, Lake & Palmer (ELP).

about_quotes.speaker: Bob Kinkel
about_quotes.evidence: I remember working with Greg Lake from Emerson, Lake & Palmer... I was working with them and teaching them songs, and figuring out how to do “Karn Evil-9” live.
about_quotes.doc_title: Bob Kinkel interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, October 31, 2012
